title: World War - Medieval Edition
description: Minecraft with a medieval twist were you can simulate giant battles with your friends
body:
**This is my first modpack so it might not be perfect. Please send feedback and I will make changes if needed.**
## Info: 

This modpack is set in the medieval time so you will have to forge your weapons and once you are rich enough hire workers to mine for you. From there skys the limit make a huge army to fights friends, or any enemies you may have. Or you could set up a merchant empire to trade for riches. All this is and more possible with this modpack so download now.

## What to expect:

I have deisgned this modpack so that you can play with medieval armour, weapons and seige tools, while not having to worry about normal minecraft tasks like farming and mining. The boring tasks can all be accomplished by villagers thanks to the villager workers mod. Ontop of this you can make huge armies to fight your friends thanks to the villager recruits mod. Another great thing about this modpack is the optimization, other mods I have added will mean you can play this modpack on the worst of pcs and not worry about fps drops. 



_**If you want to play with friends then use essentials.**_
